title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
